raw.subject: Something I noticed about Unique Nails
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about summer nail inspiration caught my eye. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you. I sketched a simple page idea that could help, with a services menu, a work gallery, and a booking CTA.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/unique-nails-cave-spring

I'd love to discuss how a website can help your business grow. As a local web developer, I offer a flat fee for small businesses like yours. If you're interested in learning more, I'd be happy to give you a quick call.
